code: import React,{useState}from"react";import"./BudgetForm.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BudgetForm=_ref=>{let{budget,setBudget}=_ref;const[amount,setAmount]=useState(budget||"");const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();const num=Number(amount);if(!amount||num<=0)return;setBudget(num);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,className:"form budget-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Set Monthly Budget"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",placeholder:"Budget Amount",value:amount,onChange:e=>setAmount(e.target.value),min:"0",step:"0.01"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Save Budget"})]});};export default BudgetForm;
